name: Field
description: Form field layout wrapper that pairs a label, input, and optional hint or error message.

root.description: Form-field wrapper coordinating label, control, help text, validation, and metadata.

label.description: Field label associated with the child control.

header.description: Header row that hosts the field label.

control.description: Slot host for the input, select, or other form control.

help.description: Supplementary guidance text for the field.

error.description: Validation message shown when the field is invalid.

meta.description: Metadata region containing help, error, and validation-progress messages.

validatingIndicator.description: Indicator shown while asynchronous validation is in progress.

members.name: name
members.description: Form field name used for form submission and as the base for auto-generated element IDs.

members.name: id
members.description: Explicit input element ID. Auto-generated from name if omitted.

members.name: required
members.description: Marks the field as required. Surfaces as aria-required on the control element.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disables the field and all of its child controls.

members.name: readOnly
members.description: Puts the field into read-only mode. The value is visible but not editable.

members.name: value
members.description: Controlled value passed through to the control adapter.

members.name: defaultValue
members.description: Uncontrolled initial value passed through to the control adapter.

members.name: onChange
members.description: Change handler called with the new value when the control changes.

members.name: validate
members.type: ((value: unknown, context: { name: string; touched: boolean; dirty: boolean }) => string | string[] | null | Promise<string | string[] | null>)
members.description: Async-capable validation function. Return null for valid, or error string(s) for invalid.

members.name: status
members.description: Validation status of the field. status=invalid renders the field in its error treatment; the error message is supplied via the error slot.

members.name: validating
members.description: True while async validation is in flight. Drives the validating indicator slot.

focus.description: FormField does not manage focus. The child control inside children handles its own focus.

relationships.description: label.for is wired to the child control's id, establishing the label association. Field propagates IDs to its slotted control via React context internally; the schema relationship records the resulting ARIA attribute.
Child control receives help id (via context propagation) to set aria-describedby when valid.
Child control receives error id (via context propagation) to set aria-describedby when invalid.

value.description: Controlled value of the field's child control, passed through context.

usageHints: Wrap every form control in a Field to ensure consistent label/error placement
Provide the control via the control slot (e.g. an Input); the label, help, and error regions are their own named slots
Set status=invalid for the error treatment; supply the message through the error slot
